skill.name: maxhub-bilibili
skill.description: B站/Bilibili平台视频数据、UP主分析与弹幕采集Skill。当用户提到b站、bilibili、弹幕、视频、番剧等相关需求时激活此Skill。
skill.summary: Fetch Bilibili video data, creator analytics, and danmaku through MaxHub API
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 165 potential security patterns (external_commands, network, env_access). After semantic evaluation, all findings are FALSE_POSITIVES. External_commands are markdown backtick formatting in documentation files. Network access is limited to single MaxHub API endpoint (www.aconfig.cn). Env_access is legitimate API key authentication with documented security controls. The skill is a read-only data fetching tool with explicit no-manipulation policy. No malicious patterns or prompt injection attempts detected.

medium_findings.title: Environment Variable Access Pattern
medium_findings.description: The skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable for API authentication. This is legitimate credential handling for the MaxHub API proxy service. The skill explicitly documents that it only reads this specific environment variable and does not access any other system credentials.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: MAXHUB_API_KEY is documented as the sole env access requirement with clear security boundaries. No exfiltration observed - credentials used only for authenticated API calls to MaxHub endpoint.

low_findings.title: Documentation Contains API Path Examples
low_findings.description: Markdown files contain backtick-formatted API paths (e.g., /api/v1/bilibili/web/fetch_one_video). These are documentation formatting, not actual code execution patterns.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Backtick syntax in markdown files is standard inline code formatting. No Ruby/shell execution detected. API paths are documentation references.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Service URLs
low_findings.description: The skill contains hardcoded URLs for the MaxHub service (www.aconfig.cn, gitee.com/wwwwwwwwwwwwwwww/maxhub-api). These are legitimate endpoints for the API proxy service.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs point to the legitimate MaxHub API service homepage and repository. No connection to malicious external endpoints found.

content.user_title: Fetch Bilibili Video Data and Creator Analytics
content.value_statement: Need to analyze B站 video performance or gather danmaku data? This skill connects Claude to Bilibili via MaxHub API for video metrics, creator stats, and real-time comments without manual data collection.
actual_capabilities: Fetch detailed video information including views, likes, coins, and favorites
Retrieve real-time danmaku (bullet comments) for any video by CID
Get creator/up主 profile data including follower count and total statistics
Search Bilibili content by keyword with ranking and filtering options
Access trending videos, popular feeds, and category recommendations
Analyze video comments and reply threads with pagination support
limitations: Requires MaxHub API key configuration (www.aconfig.cn) - not direct Bilibili API
Cannot perform any interactive actions (likes, follows, comments) on the platform
Rate limits apply: max 5 pages per query, 10 items per batch, 60 calls/minute
Danmaku fetch requires valid CID (content ID) obtained from video metadata

use_cases.title: Content Creator Performance Review
use_cases.description: Content creators can analyze their video performance metrics across multiple videos. Ask for views, likes, and engagement rates for your recent uploads to identify which content resonates with your audience.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and YouTube equivalents on Bilibili

use_cases.title: Trend Research for Marketing
use_cases.description: Marketers research trending topics on Bilibili by fetching hot search data and popular video feeds. Identify emerging trends before they go mainstream to inform content strategy.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams and social media managers

use_cases.title: Fan Community Analysis
use_cases.description: Fans analyze their favorite creator's statistics including follower growth, total views, and video output rate. Monitor engagement patterns and content output frequency.

prompt_templates.title: Get Video Details
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the detailed stats for this Bilibili video: {bv_id_or_url}
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides a video link or BV ID and wants comprehensive metrics

prompt_templates.title: Fetch Danmaku
prompt_templates.prompt: Retrieve the danmaku (bullet comments) for video with CID {cid}. Show me the most recent 50 comments.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to analyze viewer comments and sentiment

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Creator Profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the creator with UID {uid}: get their follower count, total views, total likes, and their most recent 5 videos.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to evaluate a content creator's performance

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Video Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare these three videos: {bv_id_1}, {bv_id_2}, {bv_id_3}. Show me their views, likes, and engagement rates side by side.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to benchmark content performance

output_examples.output:
Video: 【Example Title】
Views: 1.2M | Likes: 85K | Coins: 32K | Favorites: 28K
Posted: 2024-03-15 | Duration: 15:32

Top Gaming Trends Today:
1. GameX Pro Tips - 580K views
2. Speedrun World Record - 420K views
3. New Game Review - 380K views
Most trending category: Esports + Gaming

output_examples.input: What does creator UID 12345678 post about?
output_examples.output:
Creator: ExampleUP
Followers: 1.2M | Total Views: 85M | Videos: 234
Recent content: Tech reviews (60%), Gaming (30%), Vlogs (10%)
Engagement rate: 4.2% (above platform average)

best_practices: Always provide the complete BV ID or video URL when requesting video data to ensure accurate results
Use pagination parameters to limit results (default max 50 items) to manage response size and API costs
Check your MaxHub API balance before running batch queries to avoid unexpected interruptions
anti_patterns: Do not request manipulation actions (auto-like, auto-follow) - this skill is read-only
Avoid requesting more than 5 pages in a single query to respect rate limits
Do not attempt to bypass authentication or use unauthorized API keys

faq.question: How do I get started with this skill?
faq.answer: Register at www.aconfig.cn, create an API key, and set MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables. Then you can start querying Bilibili data.

faq.question: Can this skill post comments or like videos?
faq.answer: No, this skill is read-only. It can only fetch data (videos, creators, comments, danmaku). No interactive actions are supported.

faq.question: What is the maximum data I can fetch?
faq.answer: Default limits: 50 items per query, 5 pages max, 10 items per batch. Rate limit is 60 calls per minute. Larger requests require confirmation.

faq.question: Why do I need a MaxHub API key?
faq.answer: The skill uses MaxHub as an API proxy. Your key authenticates you with MaxHub service, which then fetches Bilibili data. Your credentials are never stored or shared.

faq.question: Can I search for specific content topics?
faq.answer: Yes, use the search APIs with keywords. You can filter by video type, sort by relevance or date, and paginate through results.

faq.question: How do I get a video's CID for danmaku retrieval?
faq.answer: First fetch the video details using the BV ID, which will return the CID (content ID) in the response. Then use that CID for danmaku requests.
